items.impact: all six environments are declared; only local-supervised-runtime exists in fact
trust zones declared; no automated enforcement maps artifacts to zones
contracts declared; no registry validates that production integrations match a declared contract
sandbox patterns declared; no executable sandbox harness yet
lifecycle states + transitions declared; no store records env state per id
incident-trace events declared; channel not yet provisioned in observability
OEM ingestion contract requires checksum-verified ingest; ingest tooling not yet implemented
quarantine→active transition requires auditor co-sign; no flow enforces it
no executable consoles, identity store, claim mediator, explanation renderer, reviewer registry, queue store, event log, OEM binding store; 132 candidates still await elevation
